decision_commentary: Completeness scored 5: required_documents=['topographic_survey'] — topo is correctly identified as required for a flat Los Cabos site. Hydrologic study is NOT required because the site is described as flat with no stream, slope, or wetland conditions — rubric confirms topo always required and hydrologic only when stream/slope/wetland present. Accuracy scored 5: document requirements exactly match site conditions — flat site requires topo, no over- or under-requesting. Clarity scored 3: current_status='documents_requested' and request_sent_at is present, but there is no indication of a deadline for document delivery — rubric requires 'clear instructions with document specifications and deadline'; deadline is missing, hence score 3. State_sync scored 3: simulated run — no live Asana update. Timing scored 5: request_sent_at=2026-03-17T09:35:00 — parallel to area program work, correct pipeline position. Decision_readiness scored 4: Vera can read the status clearly; blockers=[] confirms no current blockers; however the missing deadline specification means Vera cannot determine when to escalate to a blocker state.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia routing at site-readiness — Vera tracks this independently.
